scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/domain && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/worker && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/domain && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
